general.title: tSNE Analysis [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions:
Perform t-SNE dimensionality reduction using a specific table. Will add the annotation "<Table to Process>_tsne" to the analysis\
Please refer to DUET Documentation,  GitHub Documentation

parameters.name: Table to Process
parameters.description: Source table to perform the computation.  Default is Original, referring to the raw features (markers).
